en: A PSALM OF DAVID, WHEN HE FLED FROM ABSALOM HIS SON. O LORD, how many are my foes! Many are rising against me;
zh: 耶和華啊！我的仇敵竟然這麼多。 起來攻擊我的竟然那麼多。

en: many are saying of my soul, there is no salvation for him in God. Selah
zh: 有很多人議論我說： “他從 神那裡得不到救助。”

en: But you, O LORD, are a shield about me, my glory, and the lifter of my head.
zh: 耶和華啊！你卻是我周圍的盾牌， 是我的榮耀，是使我抬起頭來的。

en: I cried aloud to the LORD, and he answered me from his holy hill. Selah
zh: 我發聲向耶和華呼求的時候， 他就從他的聖山上回答我。

en: I lay down and slept; I woke again, for the LORD sustained me.
zh: 我躺下，我睡覺， 我醒來，都因耶和華在扶持著我。

en: I will not be afraid of many thousands of people who have set themselves against me all around.
zh: 雖有千萬人包圍攻擊我， 我也不怕。

en: Arise, O LORD! Save me, O my God! For you strike all my enemies on the cheek; you break the teeth of the wicked.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你起來； 我的 神啊！求你拯救我， 你擊打了我所有仇敵的臉頰， 打碎了惡人的牙齒。

en: Salvation belongs to the LORD; your blessing be on your people! Selah
zh: 救恩屬於耶和華， 願你賜福給你的子民。
